posts.author: Mattieuk (Matt Hardy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ticket Raised and not the response I was hoping for:

For info

I understand the importance of being able to remove the Card Widget. I’d be happy to continue assisting you so we can solve this as soon as possible.

Our developer team confirmed this is the new expected behavior for the cards widget. This is because there have been some updates on the Cards widget, now added in standalone mode. This means if you added it to the blank view and there are no other widgets, it will be added without the option to undock it. If it is added to a blank view and other widgets are added first, you can add and resize it and put it where needed. However, it won’t have the option to be deleted, and if you delete the other widgets, it will automatically transform into a standalone view.

In this case, I recommend deleting this dashboard and creating a new one since the cards widget needs to be removed. I’m very sorry for the inconvenience this might cause.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml: Wow, very interesting to know! Thanks so much for sharing!
